restaurants.name: White River Fish House
restaurants.desc: Fresh fish with a view of Lake Taneycomo! Bass Pro's signature restaurant on the water.

restaurants.name: Big D's BBQ
restaurants.desc: Best ribs in Branson! Casual, affordable, absolutely delicious. Local favorite.

restaurants.name: Osage Restaurant — Top of the Rock
restaurants.desc: Fine dining with stunning Ozark views at Big Cedar's Top of the Rock.

restaurants.name: Buffalo Bar & Grill
restaurants.desc: Casual dining with golf course views at Big Cedar Lodge.

restaurants.name: Tall Tales Bar & Grill
restaurants.desc: Outdoor dining, live music, fire pits at Big Cedar. Great atmosphere!

restaurants.name: The Lake House — Indian Point
restaurants.desc: Right down the road! Beautiful lake views, full bar, live entertainment.

restaurants.name: Crazy Craig's Cheeky Monkey Bar
restaurants.desc: Branson icon! Crazy decor, games, treehouse bar, dancing. Open til 1AM.

restaurants.name: Rock Lane Resort Tiki Bar
restaurants.desc: Swim-up bar on Table Rock Lake! Order drinks right from the water. Courtesy docks — boat right up.

restaurants.name: Flaming Margaritas at the Landing
restaurants.desc: Famous margs, rooftop views, live music, fountain show views at Branson Landing!

restaurants.name: Laketime Bistro — Kimberling City
restaurants.desc: Cozy lakeside hideaway! 4.5 ⭐ seafood & steak. Full bar. 20 min drive.

restaurants.name: Billy Bob's Dairyland
restaurants.desc: Old-school ice cream parlor. Classic shakes, malts, and burgers.

restaurants.name: Crazy Craig's Treehouse
restaurants.desc: Frozen custard and treats at the famous treehouse bar.
